core_mechanism: combinatorial group-testing / pooled-measurement scheme: identifying a small unknown sparse support from aggregated threshold-indicator queries, with the required number of queries governed by the information-theoretic rate log2(n-choose-k) and characterized by matching achievability and converse bounds
brief_reason: The abstract seeks to identify a size-k defective subset among n items from pooled tests that fire when the count of defectives meets a chosen threshold, and quantifies performance by the ratio of log2(n-choose-k) to the number of tests with paired achievable and converse results.
